name: Zefrasaber, Swordmaster of the Nekroz
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>影霊衣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネクロス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－セフィラセイバー
name_jp_tl_base: Shadow Spirit Cloth of the Swordmaster - Sephirasaber
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Nekroz" and "Zefra" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.

[ Monster Effect ] 
You can Tribute this card from your hand or face-up from your side of the field; Tribute monsters from your hand or field, then Ritual Summon 1 "Nekroz" Ritual Monster from your hand whose Level exactly equals the total Levels of those monsters. You can only use this effect of "Zefrasaber, Swordmaster of the Nekroz" once per turn.
pend_eff: You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Nekroz" and "Zefra" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.

summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
